hypothesis: A frozen O1 soft field can reduce exact full-round ChaCha20 search work when its sign and confidence order are supplied as reversible first-encounter key decisions rather than 256 hard units.
prediction: The exact solver will repair at least one incorrect low-confidence key decision under 32768 conflicts, and the real O1 field will improve matched 512-conflict search telemetry over both internal and coordinate-shuffled guidance even if it does not yet recover the key.
controls: internal CaDiCaL under the same 512-conflict limit
persistent O1 phase without external decision order
coordinate-shuffled frozen O1 vault at K256
post-reveal exact-truth guidance as a mechanism ceiling
post-reveal one-error guidance at four nested conflict limits
post-reveal 255-correct plus one unguided residual-bit ceiling
next_action: If one wrong first-encounter key hint is not repaired, close key-only CDCL guidance and move the learned field to relation/proof factors or a specialized exact residual compiler rather than scaling conflicts.
